The rule set in Arc 2 punishes monowil more than bluewil
Bluewil is the "simpler" versions. Think of it as the more user friendly version of Monowil just with a lower dmg cap.

There are cutscenes before after chapters. Runs can be said to be pages in a chapter because this game is split into 9 + 3 chapters. Its not a true roguelike, more like it posesses certain roguelite elements
And beats up most newbies most of the time

Okay how does keyflare increase faster
Using arithmetica or cards that give keyflare

Units build Keyflare via playing their cards, and consuming Arithma. Keyflare is a Stat. This base Stat line varies from character to character. If a unit is a “Keyflare” character, their base Stat line will be higher.(Most Keyflare characters have Keyflare increases or Keyflare mechanics within their kit) You can increase this Stat “Keyflare” via WoDs(Wheels/Weapons) and Covs(Lvl 63 Artifacts).

Sorel is the one of the weaker Caro Dps Units. However, there is someone named Dux Ad Cinis that made her work. If they can, you can too! By far Tawil is the “strongest” and “best” Awakener here, but she is extremely complicated until you understand her mechanics and gameplay loop. Last is Murphy. Murphy has a Exalt(Ultimate) that can all damage taken this turn in half, and then proceed to take a DoT that halves every turn, based on the damage taken during the half damage turn. Murphy’s 3 Cost Card can reduce their Sacrifice(The DoT) by half when played.

I will now explain Tawil at E0. Her Exalt, and her two cards “Omnisicent Verity” X Cost, and “Pinions” a 2 Cost. Her Rouse too.

Tawil Exalt makes her able to pick 3 cards from all the Awakeners within the Realm she currently is mixed with(or just Mono Chaos) out of 5 cards. The cards gain Retain(Can Be Held in Hand). After doing so, the next card you play will be played TWICE. 

“Omniscient Verity” is a X Cost card that copies the top card of your deck, while granting Tawil X Aliemus.

“Pinions” are a 2 cost card that grants Tawil X Strength, and shuffles a “Twin Wing” into the deck. “Twin Wings” are a 2 cost card that hits the enemy two times, and gives Tawil X Aliemus and shuffles a “Four Wings” into the deck. “Four Wings” are a 2 cost card that hits the enemy 4 times, and lowers the enemy’s STR by X, and shuffles a “Six Wing” into the deck. “Six Wings” are a 2 cost card that hits the enemy 6 times, and grants a “Special Effect”. The Special Effect Ranges from: Give A Ally 60(70) Aliemus/Reshuffled Your Hand And Draw 3 more Cards/Gain 1 Barrier that blocks One Hit Completely/Choose a Card in your deck and out it in your hand at 0 cost/Deal 15% of Max Health of the Enemy/Choose one of three Posse to activate. All “Wings” can be played using 500 Keyflare if you don’t have enough Arithma.

Her Rouse makes it so any Arithma consumed by her generates 50% more Keyflare. You gain a “Silver Key” card. This card when played allows you to proc a chosen “Posse” out of 3 choices, twice.
—————

E1: Her “Omniscient Verity” card costs 1 less Arithma. When playing “Pinion”, gain 1 Insight(1 Arithma and Draw 1). 

Thus making her two unique cards cost 1 less basically.

E2: The cards from her Exalt gain Prepare(Holding them in hand reduces their cost by 1). 

E3: Gain 3% Crit Rate and Crit Dmg every time you play her “Strike” or “Defend”, to a max of 30%. When you proc Death Resistance, gain a card called “Cocoon of Revival”(Restores your health and shield to the amount you had last turn).

OE(OverExalt): For this turn, all Tawil’s DMG/Shield/Healing is Amped by 35%. The OverExalt allows you to choose from 10 cards. You also gain 3 Arithma.
———-

Her playstyle loop is super flexible, but there is one consistent, play as many “Pinions” and “Wings” as possible. Her Exalt serves as a way to find solutions to problems that can occur in the future, or setup a burst turn. Finding cards that apply Weakness or Heal you for defensives. finding cards that apply Vulnerable or Deals a Bunch of Damage for offensives. However, what remains consistent with her Exalt is you want the effect of “Double Play the Next Card” to be on “Pinions” or “Wings”. Her main damage source, and a really good and consistent one at that, is her “Wings”. “Omniscient Verity” is a complete RNG card and will never be consistent. “Pinions” in your damage and scaling on Tawil as the card “Pinions” gives STR. 

At E0, she is hard to play and requires some creativity as her cards are expensive and RNG factor. 

With E1, she is much easier and more reliable to play as her cards are now 1 Cost “Pinions” due to the “Insight” gain. Her “Omniscient Verity” is one cheaper so 2 cost is 1 and 3 cost is 2. Making her less Arithma restricted.

E2 is her sweet spot, allowing her “Exalt” cards to gain Prepare 1. This allows you to hold the cards, AND make them cheaper, the longer you hold them. Enabling further flexibility.

Her E3 is… alright..? The Crit Rate and Crit Dmg is definitely nice, but you won’t be allowed to scale that far later on. Early on, it’s really nice, but it’s alot of invest for E3. The “Cocoon of Revival” can save you in niche scenarios or be completely useless, no in between. 

Her Overexalt(OE) is really powerful. Having the ability to enable a massive temp buff this turn for a big BURST turn with “Wings” in your hand(or drawn). Furthermore, being able to choose out of 10 cards brings even more flexibility to the table. A damage up and flexibility up.
———-

content:
Her Teammates are rather complex due to her flexibility of gaining cards via “Exalt” depending on the Realm she is in. The one constant of her in any Realm though is she desires teammates that can help her draw her “Pinions” from the deck, or synergies well with her kit.

For Chaos to name some:
Ryker/Karen/Hameln/Nautila

For Aequor:
Celeste/Caecus/Murphy/Goliath

For Caro:
Pickman/Thais

For Ultra:
Jenkin/Clem/Castor

There are vastly more teams that I may be unaware of, or forgot but she is very flexible.
————

Tawil can take on the role of a DPS or Support depending on Comps and Realms. In Chaos and Aequor, she is known for DPS. In Ultra/Caro she is known more for Support(not to say people don’t break that mold…). 

With Chaos, it grants her the ability to Exalt frequently while generating a load of Keyflare, which can be used to play her “Wings”. Other Awakeners in Chaos with Mono Chaos Realm, enable her to play a “Infinite Cycle” team where you can practically make your turn infinite(take 10 years). 

With Aequor, she synergies well with Aequor Realm granting access to Tentacles. Tentaclss can change stance to “White” and “Red”. “White” stance gives the team shield which helps with survivability, but the core is “Red” stance which makes it so EVERY HIT makes a Tentacle attack once. With Tawil’s “Wings” granting multi-hits the more you play them, the synergies very well with the Tentacles.  

For Caro, she is known more for abusing a Awakener called “Pickman”. Pickman makes it so any “Discover” mechanic activated makes his 4 cost card cheaper. Tawil’s Exalt being a “Discover” works as a support for Pickman.

For Ultra, Tawil can do some crazy card manipulation with Ultra Turn and Ultra Awakeners. I don’t have much knowledge of this Realm with Tawil, but from my understanding, she can Support by Manipulating Cards by pulling Ultra Awakeners cards, or DPS by copying Jenkin cards or proccing Corrosion from Castor.
————

Wods and Covs:
The WoDs(Wheels/Weapons) for Tawil are her Signature Wheel “Wheel Unseen”, and honestly, a-lot of different wheels. The most used are “Blade of the Titan +12”. There is also “Eternal Requiem” / “Dearest Friend” for Damage Tawil. “Moment of Reunion” is used only for Support Tawil. which works with her. You can ask around to figure this out based on what WoDs you have, and can get.

For Covs(Artifacts), she uses “Dream of Medicine”. “Medicine” is a Cov that shuffles two addition unique cards from the Awakener, for Tawil being “Omniscient Verity” and “Pinions of Time”. This is very strong due to pretty obvious reasons. Allowing her 2 copies of X card “Omniscient” which allows even more crazy RNG pulls. By now you should know why 2 copies of “Pinions of Time” is good….more “Wings”. The downside of “Medicine” is losing 8 Black Sigils for every encounter, for this “run”.

just wondering y'all, when it comes to cards generated during combat, what's the specific rules on what stays in the deck after the battle ends and what doesn't? Only things saved between combat is your hp, alienus, and keyflare meter

For phantasmal dive what does the proxy certificate do?

Allows you to skip the run. The next day, you’ll receive rewards equal to the amount you earned the day before.
For example, if yesterday you cleared Phantasmal Dive 5 and earned 700 D-Jewels, using a proxy certificate will give you 700 D-Jewels tomorrow — so you don’t have to repeat the run today.
